title: carex atrata f. aterrima
intro: Carex atrata f. aterrima, also known as the black sedge, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. It is believed to offer various health benefits, including the reduction of fever, the treatment of respiratory issues, and the relief of pain and discomfort. Carex atrata f. aterrima can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water, or dried and used as a powder in herbal remedies.
